name: game-design
description: Game design toolkit for creating PRDs, scouting trends, and integrating games into projects. Includes skills for concept discovery, engagement systems, scoring mechanics, mobile UX, performance optimization, and specialized agents for QA testing and code review.

agents.name: game-qa-tester
agents.description: QA testing agent that systematically tests browser games for bugs, edge cases, UX issues, mobile compatibility, and gameplay problems. Provides detailed bug reports with severity levels.

agents.name: game-code-reviewer
agents.description: Code review agent specialized for browser games. Reviews code for architecture, performance, mobile compatibility, audio handling, animation patterns, and provides a quality score.

agents.name: leaderboard-validator
agents.description: Security validation agent for game leaderboards. Reviews score submission systems, anti-cheat patterns, API security, and provides recommendations for secure implementations.
